requirement.title: REQ-1102
requirement.requirement: In the event of connecting the OBC (vehicle) to the mains, the inrush current drawn from the OBC (e.g. to precharge its internal bulk capacitor) shall not exceed the limits of a circuit breaker type B with a nominal current of 8 A, shall not exceed 48 A for a longer time periode than 5 milliseconds and shall not disturb RCDs.
